title: Why Did Modi Keep Women's Quota Bill In Cold Storage For 30 months, Questions Kharge
description: "But Modi is saying that the Women's Reservation Bill is defeated. The Women's Reservation Bill is different, and the new delimitation bill is different. We passed the Women's Reservation bill in 2023 itself. And Modi ji himself congratulated all parties for the unanimity. And all people unanimously voted and passed," he said
